bug.description: protocol timer configured with incorrect duration violating 3GPP timing requirements

prompt:
There is a protocol timer configured with incorrect duration violating 3GPP timing requirements downstream of function tx_list_remove_sn in the openair2/LAYER2/rlc_v2 subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/rlc_v2/rlc_entity_am.c:486.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
